title: Make Greenland Great Again Act
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on Foreign Affairs.
crs_summary: Make Greenland Great Again Act This bill authorizes the President to seek to enter into negotiations with Denmark to acquire Greenland. If such an agreement is reached, the President must transmit the agreement and related materials to Congress within five calendar days. The agreement shall go into effect 60 calendar days after such transmission unless Congress enacts a joint resolution of disapproval.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Foreign Affairs.
